race.comment: THE LAST DANCE (11) is going better than his form reads and gets in well at the minimum at a venue he adores. Drops back in trip off a quicken freshen and can reel them in late if the pace is genuine. Can't knock the form of CHEF MILITAIRE (6) who shoots for four on the bounce, though this is a rise in grade. Also gets in at the minimum with the claimer staying on and is drawn to get all the favours. Sure to be very competitive again. THERE GOES MY HERO (8) kicked off the campaign with flashing light efforts but has gone a touch amiss in his last two. Drops back to a sprinting trip on the quick turnaround from Wednesday and is worth keeping in mind. WARM BREEZE (9) caught the eye here first-up when closing off strongly into the placings. Likely to drift back again from the draw and charge late. Don't dismiss.
